mapper.select: SELECT * FROM outfit_advice_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM outfit_advice_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND occasion = #{occasion} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM outfit_advice_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_favorite = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outfit_advice_records WHERE user_id = #{userId}
